pi_items.source: setup_task.sh defines this variable and downloads raw.githubusercontent.com/opengeos/data/main/raster/landsat.tif to this path.
export_result.sh explicit variable assignment for parsing XML outputs.
export_result.sh explicit variable assignment for execution output check.

privileged_info_summary: The task constructs a visual graph pipeline via SNAP Desktop. The input target is a real Landsat multi-spectral image fetched from the opengeos dataset and written to /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. The setup explicitly verifies output targets at /home/ga/snap_exports/visual_pipeline.xml and /home/ga/snap_exports/pipeline_output.dim using bash and python extraction scripts.
